title: Microstachys corniculata

intro: Microstachys corniculata, also known as "Palo Santo", is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, which can aid in the treatment of various ailments, including skin infections and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Microstachys corniculata include limonoids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
